critic_raw:
Assessor A: NDCG@10 is appropriate for search quality evaluation but doesn't measure ticket deflection. The product context makes clear that users viewing better-ranked articles still open tickets for reasons the ranking can't fix. Verdict: critique_wins.

Assessor B: Query-mix stratification is absent. An 11% overall lift is uninterpretable without knowing whether it's concentrated in high-ticket-volume queries. The deployment decision could be based on gains that are irrelevant to the business problem. Verdict: critique_wins.

Assessor C: Replacing a production search stack before a major product launch based solely on NDCG@10 improvement is an insufficient evidence base for that decision. Verdict: critique_wins.

Synthesis: Unanimous critique_wins.
